title: galium maritimum f. luteum
intro: Galium maritimum f. luteum, also known as the yellow coastal bedstraw, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Galium maritimum plant found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Galium maritimum f. luteum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Galium maritimum f. luteum is typically prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
